description: POST-RELOCATION LIVE E2E (parity): mock-IdP agent flow still passes — Admin agent reads a real ticket; no-role agent -> 403; untrusted issuer -> 401; action audited
CE build: /api/mcp + /api/v1/mcp/* + PRM return 404/stub, and no EE governance source is bundled
EE production build (npm run build:ee) compiles + bundles the relocated MCP governance
run-ee-migrations.js applies the relocated agent migrations on a fresh DB without double-applying
Real IdP smoke (one provider): token round-trip -> agent dispatch returns real data -> audit row written
npx @alga-psa/mcp-connector (from npm) connects to an instance and lists/calls the 3 tools
Admin UI happy path: register an IdP, create an agent, assign a role — entirely from the UI — and the agent record + binding persist
Admin UI: audit viewer lists an agent's tool calls and exports them
Admin UI permission gate: a non-admin user cannot access MCP settings / provisioning
Session-key cleanup removes expired purpose='mcp_agent' keys and leaves active ones
Audit granularity: a kernel-denied (403) call records decision='deny'; a 404/other error records decision='error'
